title: CORE Morphology Record
description: A single inflected surface form for a lemma, with its full morphological feature bundle.

lemma_id.description: Foreign key to a lemma record in the same pack.

surface_form.description: The fully inflected surface form in native script.

features.description: Key-value morphological feature bundle. Keys vary by language and part of speech.

notes.description: Optional philological or parsing note. Null if not needed.
